title: lichen_l2.c:1751 lichen_l2_input mutex acquired after precondition checks
description: Contract violation: lichen_l2_input() - Precondition checks (lines 1757-1778) are done without mutex, which is correct for early rejection. However, the len checks use LICHEN_MIN_FRAME_LEN and MAX_LORA_FRAME which are compile-time constants - good. The issue is that link_ctx_initialized is checked at 1790 AFTER acquiring mutex. This is correct because link_ctx_initialized could change between early checks and mutex acquire. The function correctly re-checks under mutex. No bug here actually - defensive programming is correct.
close_reason: Not a bug: Function correctly does precondition checks before mutex, then re-checks critical state after mutex acquisition.
